# CLI Core

Core CLI functionality and utilities for Hooksmith.

## Dependencies

- anyhow
- clap
- serde
- serde_json

## Features

- Command parsing
- Error handling
- Configuration management

## Usage

```rust
use hooksmith::cli_core::{CliApp, Config};

let config = Config::default();
let app = CliApp::new(config);
app.run()?;
```
